item.text: I’m going to inspect `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs` directly, extract the `LoopAuditEvent` enum variant identifiers, then sort them alphabetically and return exactly those names.
I found the enum block and now I’m running one extraction command to mechanically confirm the exact variant identifiers and alphabetical order.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "awk '/pub enum LoopAuditEvent \\{/{in_enum=1; next} in_enum && /"'^}/{in_enum=0} in_enum {if (match($0,/''^[[:space:]]*([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)[[:space:]]*'"\\{/ ,m)) print m[1]}' crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs | sort"
